chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1276 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on MA 10644/2025. 08.12.2025. Mr. Abdullah Soomro, Advocate for applicant. = Urgency granted. Counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this bail application which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE Tufail
